found_product_bug: TrainRailPlaceSystemService.CreatePlaceInfo() (moorestech_client/Assets/Scripts/Client.Game/InGame/BlockSystem/PlaceSystem/TrainRail/TrainRailPlaceService.cs, ManualUpdate/CreatePlaceInfo local function) built the PlaceInfo for rail-pier UI placement without setting PlaceInfo.BlockId, leaving it at the default BlockId 0. Every frame while aiming to place a pier, PlacementPreviewBlockGameObjectController.SetPreviewAndGroundDetect -> BlockPlacePreviewObjectPool.GetObject(0) -> PreviewBlockCreator.Create(0) -> MasterHolder.BlockMaster.GetBlockMaster(0) threw InvalidOperationException 'BlockElement not found. BlockId:0', aborting ManualUpdate before it ever reached the ScreenLeftClick.GetKeyUp check, so the placement protocol was never sent and UI-route pier placement was completely non-functional (reproduced first attempt: Until '橋脚設置反映 (10,32,6)' timed out after 15s with ~480 repeated exceptions in the log). The exact same failure mode (missing BlockId on a hand-built PlaceInfo) was already identified and worked around elsewhere in the codebase, see the comment at GearChainPoleFrameInputCollector.cs:70-71 ('BlockId未設定だとプレビュー生成がBlockElement not foundで毎フレーム死ぬ'), confirming this is a known-pattern regression that was never applied to the TrainRail place system. Applied the same fix (capture holdingBlockId via MasterHolder.BlockMaster.GetBlockId(itemId) and set PlaceInfo.BlockId = holdingBlockId) and re-ran the scenario; all 5 asserts passed (compile clean, 0 errors/warnings introduced).
summary: レール橋脚2本をビルドメニュー→キーマウ操作で設置し、レールを手持ちにしてクリック結線する新規シナリオを作成。初回実行でTrainRailPlaceSystemServiceのPlaceInfo.BlockId未設定によるプロダクトバグ（設置プロトコルに到達しない）を検出・特定し、GearChainPole側の既知パターンに倣って1行修正、再実行で全5asserts PASSし橋脚2本のRailNode接続をサーバー側で確認した。
